translations: O you who believe O you who believe
puzzle.hint: This verse calls believers to fundamental acts of worship and righteous deeds for ultimate success.
puzzle.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ وَٱسْجُدُوا۟ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ وَٱفْعَلُوا۟ ٱلْخَيْرَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ ۩
puzzle.verseEn: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good - that you may succeed.
